match.userMessage:
Slow steady handheld tilt upward follows Scarlett as she grasps the coral tube from the wet sand edge, lifts it while water streams off the metal, then straightens fully upright holding it in her right hand. Ocean foam recedes around her bare feet with droplets catching the light and gentle wave wash shifting the shoreline sand.

gentle ocean waves receding across wet sand. water streaming and dripping from metal tube, soft sand shift under bare feet.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
